exceptions: sleeping may use the user-approved hard-edged pixel Zzz sequence

states.name: Blanket Drag
states.action: Stretch, tire, catch the blanket, and drag it beside the body.

states.name: Top-down Sleep
states.accessory: top-down mattress, pillow, the same large blanket, and user-approved pixel Zzz
states.action: Lie flat on the pillow under the blanket; keep closed eyes and both claws visible while the blanket breathes and three Z shapes rise.

states.name: Blanket Wake
states.action: Spring up while the whole blanket slides behind and to one side.

states.name: Claw Count
states.action: Count with alternating claws, look left and right, then hold a decision pose.

states.name: Busy Claws
states.action: Alternate both claws through a fast work rhythm, then pause to inspect.

states.name: Helper Handoff
states.action: Greet the helpers, point out the work, and send them onward.

states.name: Jar Assist
states.accessory: one large jar beside the body
states.action: Twist twice, strain, then push the jar toward the owner without covering the face.

states.name: Pocket Fold
states.action: Press the long strip progressively into a pocket-size fold.

states.name: Rollout Mat
states.action: Unroll the mat across the floor and step onto the finished workspace.

states.name: Self High-five
states.action: Crouch, hop, make both claws meet overhead, hold, and settle.

states.name: Failed Stand
states.action: Wobble, flop to one side, attempt to stand, and flop the other way.
